message:
fix(core): three bugs found via deep code investigation

1. patterns.rs: Fix UTF-8 char boundary correction direction in tail
   buffer truncation. When start position lands mid-character, search
   backward (start -= 1) to include the character, not forward which
   silently drops it. Affects cross-segment pattern matching with
   multi-byte characters (emoji, CJK). Two instances fixed.

2. retry.rs: Round delay_ms before casting f64 to u64 to prevent
   systematic truncation bias in jittered backoff (e.g., 100.7ms
   becomes 101ms not 100ms).

3. fleet_memory_controller.rs: Guard against division by zero in
   eviction planning when a pane has warm_pages > 0 but warm_bytes == 0.
   Skip such panes instead of producing Infinity in target_frac.

21,278 lib tests pass. No regressions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
